review_title: Good product overall, but needs updates
description: The overall experience with the software as well as the team that we interface with, in particular [sensitive content hidden] are incredibly responsive and well-natured. Interacting with them is a breeze and they seem to be really responsible individuals and dedicated at their jobs.
author: Pankaj S.
pros: The dashboard has been built exactly to suit our needs and performs exceptionally well. It is really secure as login without OTP is not possible. Automailer feature is efficient and provides timely needful data. The performance dashboard in particular provides an excellent resource for everyone in an easy to understand visualization.
cons: The response times for the dashboards can be quite slow. If the value on a chart is zero then the information on the automailer shows up empty instead of zero, which shouldn't be the case. There are times when there's a huge lag in the OTP being received on the phone thus making it a frustrating user experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: My experience with Verdis is just good.
author: Younis A.
pros: Data security is one of the good thing about VERDIS
cons: Complexity in use, needs extensive training for each module
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: It helps me with the analytics, and the graphs which I used to develop in Power Bi and Excel here I can view those KPIs with only a few clicks which help to save my time, and can invest more time in analysis rather than reports preparation.We have integrated it with DMS (Delivery Management system ), which can give a real-time analysis that helps me in multiple ways.It is integrated with Both WMS and DMS so that our whole supply chain is capturing all the real-time data at the same time, analysis has also been done so that it can make a Tech-enabled supply chain that Increases transparency, increase traceability which leads to a sustainable supply chain.
author: Sandeep K.
pros: 1. The most impactful and impressive feature is M-Chat:This feature provides me the feasibility to monitor every KPI from my WhatsApp.2. Can create customized KPI as per requirement and can also analyze that Visual.3. Can schedule some alerts on the basis of SLA or some analysis it can directly mail that KPI to you and the concerned person this process can also be done in bulk.
cons: As we can't deny the fact everything has Pros and Cons so the things are:1. UI is good and easy to understand but it can be better.2. Sometimes it takes more time than usual.3. There is no "Back" button in any module.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Anshul P.
pros: We are using the replenishment planning module of Verdis and without any doubt it has seamlessly helped us to automate the replenishment across our diverse distribution network. It has revolutionized the way we manage our supply chain, making it more efficient, cost-effective, and responsive. It analyzes historical data, market trends, and customer behavior to generate accurate demand forecasts. This has eliminated the guesswork from our inventory planning process, allowing us to make data-driven decisions with confidence. The software also automatically adjusts its forecasts basis real-time data for optimal stock levels at all times. It takes into account various factors such as lead times and supplier constraints to determine the most efficient replenishment plan.The software also considers seasonality and promotions, allowing us to make strategic decisions to meet increased demand during peak periods.The dashboard provides a comprehensive overview of key metrics, such as inventory levels, order status, and supplier performance.Furthermore, the integration capabilities are exceptional. It seamlessly integrates with our existing ERP allowing for real-time data synchronization and eliminating the need for manual data entry.In terms of customer support, the team is exceptional. They provided thorough training to our team and have been highly responsive whenever a support is required.
cons: Nothing noteworthy to mention but we hope that Verdis team continue providing the similar experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellently packaged, fully featured and nearly ready for limelight
description: Overall, the experience while using the product has been really good. I hope to be able to continue testing it further and work on developing more features that would really boost our business operations. After some improvement, this could become the go-to product for businesses.
author: Ishaan T.
pros: The visualization of the entire supply chain process right from a shipment being picked to being delivered is excellent it can also dig in deeper as well.
cons: The response times on a couple of key features could be improved along with the ability to export a bit more granular data would make this a more fully featured product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
